svg.text: Solve linear system 1 * x - 2 * y + 3 * z = 2 ( row 1 ) - 2 * x + y + 3 * z = 2 ( row 2 ) 3 * x + 0 * y + z = 4 ( row 3 ) We use method available for any range for system We combine rows to diagonalize system with 0 if term is not on diagonal We are working column by column, we can begin with first column We keep first row For second we can get 0 in first column with 1 * row 2 + 2 * row 1 For third we can get 0 in first column with 1 * row 3 - 3 * row 1 1 * x - 2 * y + 3 * z = 2 ( row 1 ) 0 * x - 3 * y + 9 * z = 6 ( row 2 ) 0 * x + 6 * y - 8 * z = - 2 ( row 3 ) For second column, we keep second row For first we can get 0 in second column with - 3 * row 1 + 2 * row 2 For third we can get 0 in second column with - 3 * row 3 - 6 * row 2 - 3 * x + 0 * y + 9 * z = 6 ( row 1 ) 0 * x - 3 * y + 9 * z = 6 ( row 2 ) 0 * x + 0 * y - 30 * z = - 30 ( row 3 ) We can stop here, read value for z and then for y and x For third column, we keep third row For first we can get 0 in third column with - 30 * row 1 - 9 * row 3 For second we can get 0 in third column with - 30 * row 2 - 9 * row 3 90 * x + 0 * y + 0 * z = 90 ( row 1 ) 0 * x + 90 * y + 0 * z = 90 ( row 2 ) 0 * x + 0 * y - 30 * z = - 30 ( row 3 ) We can read values for x y and z 90 * x = 90 ; x = 90 / 90 ; x = 1 90 * y = 90 ; y = 90 / 90 ; y = 1 - 30 * z = - 30 ; z = - 30 / - 30 ; z = 1 This method is very easy to program and can apply for any number of equations
